source: plan/bearings.md § Article hero art — colorful keyboard SVGs (locked 2026-05-09), trends piece -> sparkline silhouette; adapted per brief to a vendor-density theme
template: directive: simple line drawing + single splash of color illustrative of subject
subject: A single vendor-hub node (keyboard-shaped capsule with an inner diamond mark, dusty-rose filled) centered in the upper-mid canvas, with five thin threads fanning out to five distinct project glyphs arranged in a loose arc beneath it: two keycap-row silhouettes (GMK CYL regional-partner colorway group buys, one at far-left, one at right-mid, each with a small accent-ring cap standing in for a novelty/legend piece), two generic board silhouettes (other concurrent fulfillment projects, left-mid and far-right), and one larger, denser board silhouette at center for 'Paper 65' -- Prototypist's own kit line, drawn bolder and tied to the hub with a thicker thread to distinguish first-party product from pass-through fulfillment. A tracker sparkline runs along the bottom edge, rising left-to-right from a decline into positive territory, with a faint dashed zero-baseline and a zero-crossing marker, ending in a focal dot at the current up-trending score. Warm-bronze theme dot at the upper-right margin.
data_sources: data/trends/2026-W30.json -- Prototypist row (category: vendor, direction: up, score: 20, spark: [-35,-30,-25,-18,-10,2,15,20]), note: "Prototypist's Paper 65 kit group buy (opened March 31) continues toward Q4 2026 delivery while its GMK CYL Midnight Rainbow R2 project and 2026 relaunch push keep the vendor visible."

design_notes.hub_position: keyboard-shaped capsule, center (600, 268), splash-filled -- the only splash-colored element in the fan proper

glyph_arc.A_far_left: keycap-row, x=150, GMK CYL regional-partner colorway 1
glyph_arc.B_left_mid: board outline, x=375, generic concurrent fulfillment project
glyph_arc.C_center: board outline, x=600, 'Paper 65' own kit line -- larger, 3 key-dot rows (vs 2 elsewhere), bolder connecting thread
glyph_arc.D_right_mid: keycap-row, x=825, GMK CYL regional-partner colorway 2 (Midnight Rainbow R2, per tracker note)
glyph_arc.E_far_right: board outline, x=1050, generic concurrent fulfillment project

design_notes.sparkline_mapping: y = 700 - (score + 35) / 55 * 120 across x = 90..1110 (8 evenly spaced weekly readings); the decline portion (scores -35..-18) sits at or below the wash band's bottom edge (y=660), crossing back into the warm wash as the score turns positive -- the wash boundary doubles as an implicit 'into the black' marker
design_notes.zero_crossing_marker: interpolated point (790, 624) between the week-6 (-10) and week-7 (2) readings, marking where the series crosses zero
design_notes.theme_dot_position: cx=1148 cy=88 r=9, with two satellite micro-dots (dusty-rose + bronze) for family cohesion

stroke_weight: 2px (sparkline rendered at 2.5px for legibility as the focal motif)
